title: celtis occidentalis f. canina
intro: Celtis occidentalis f. canina, also known as the American Hackberry, is a variety of the Hackberry tree native to eastern North America. The plant's medicinal properties have been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and wounds, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Celtis occidentalis f. canina include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
